explorer-description: Switch wiki instances and REST modules using live discovery data.
explorer-module-rail-description: Browse each discovered module, then expand it to inspect the endpoints before loading it into the reference view.
explorer-empty-modules: No modules available for this instance.
explorer-no-selectable-modules: No modules with usable specs are available for this instance.
explorer-discovery-error: Discovery request failed for this instance.
explorer-bootstrap-error: Explorer bootstrap failed for this wiki instance.
explorer-loading-instance-description: Fetching discovery and module specs for
explorer-scalar-switching: Loading selected module in reference view...
explorer-spec-missing: No spec URL is available for the selected module.
explorer-endpoints-empty: No endpoint entries were found for this module.
explorer-endpoints-error: Could not load the endpoint list for this module.
